name: PHP MVC Framework
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get install -y python3.11-venv && composer install && python3 -m venv /home/vscode/.venv && /home/vscode/.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && echo 'source ~/.venv/bin/activate' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'source ~/.venv/bin/activate' >> ~/.zshrc && if [ -f /home/vscode/.ssh/id_ed25519 ]; then git config --global gpg.format ssh && git config --global user.signingkey /home/vscode/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub && git config --global commit.gpgsign true && echo 'Git SSH commit signing configured.'; fi
